meta.title: Habitat One — Build, renovate & live beautifully in Xàbia
meta.description: The complete platform for building, renovating and living in Xàbia. Premium materials, curated properties, legal support and architectural design — all in one place on the Costa Blanca.

hero.title: Everything your home is made of.
hero.subtitle: From Flexibel Stone walls to baths, acrylic panels, lighting and fireplaces — Habitat One delivers the surfaces and fittings for the Mediterranean home.

home.onestopTitle: Habitat One: your one-stop building experience in Xàbia.
home.onestopLead: From first sketch to final handover, we bring design, materials and construction together under one roof — making building, renovating or developing in Xàbia simple and effortless.
home.onestopBlock1Text: From inspiration and design to materials and execution, Habitat One brings every part of the building journey together under one roof.
home.onestopBlock2Text: A true one-stop shopping experience where homeowners, investors and developers receive expert guidance, coordinated services and complete peace of mind.
home.onestopBlock3Text: Discover innovative materials, new technologies and curated design solutions that help turn ideas into exceptional spaces.
home.onestopBlock4Text: Access affordable, innovative and high-performance building materials that improve quality, efficiency and sustainability.
home.magicLead: Real natural stone that bends to the wall — lighter than tile, in sheets up to 1.2 × 3.06 m. We chose it because the warmth of travertine, wood and earth can land anywhere in the house: walls, ceilings, furniture, façades.
home.magicPoint1Text: Travertine, burnt wood, concrete, limestone — more than thirty finishes under one collection.
home.magicPoint2Text: Large sheets, joined continuously. No tile grid — the surface of real stone.
home.magicPoint3Text: Stands up to salt, sun and damp. Indoor and out, on flat or curved surfaces.
home.featuredLead: Large-format travertine with delicate veining and a warm Roman cast. Bends to curved walls, asks for no grout — and holds the sun- and hand-warmth that old Xàbia stone has by nature.
home.featuredCaption: On site · Flexibel Stone in a Xàbia villa
home.story1Line3: The calm of concrete, without the weight
home.story2Line2: Warm beige tones — Roman and timeless
home.pillarsTitle: Everything a home in Xàbia needs
home.pillarsText: Buying, building and renovating on the Costa Blanca usually means juggling a dozen companies. We've put them under one roof.
home.pillarMaterialsText: Large-format stone & wood boards, solid-surface bathware, terrazzo, microcement and faucets — sourced for the Mediterranean climate.
home.pillarPropertiesText: Independent local estate agents work alongside us from the Xàbia showroom — and the homes they list, you can turn into a finished home with one team.
home.pillarLegalText: Conveyancing, NIE, licences and project permits handled by trusted local lawyers — in your language.
home.pillarDesignText: Architects and interior designers who shape light, stone and shade into homes that feel like Xàbia.
home.spacesText: Indoors and out — explore curated materials and ideas for each part of the Mediterranean home.
home.materialsText: Travertine, charcoal-burnt timber, rammed earth, beige concrete — natural-looking finishes engineered to last by the sea.
home.productsText: A glimpse of the pieces we specify most for kitchens, bathrooms and façades in Xàbia.
home.rangeText: From bathrooms to lighting — Habitat One supplies the whole interior. Explore the rest of the range.
home.projectsText: On every project the before and the after sit side by side — see how a tired house on the Costa Blanca becomes a calm, light-filled Mediterranean home.
home.processTitle: From idea to keys in five steps
home.processText: A single point of contact from the first call to the day you light the candle on the terrace.
home.step1Text: We meet on site, understand your plot, budget and dreams, and walk the property together.
home.step2Text: Architects and our material team draw the spaces and select finishes for the climate and the light.
home.step3Text: Our lawyers handle the purchase, permits and paperwork so nothing stalls the build.
home.step4Text: Vetted local builders deliver the works, supervised against the design and material specification.
home.step5Text: We hand over a finished home — and stay on call for maintenance, furniture and the next idea.
home.testimonialsTitle: Homes, and the people in them
home.locationTitle: Sun on the Montgó, salt in the air
home.locationText: Between the Montgó massif and the cliffs of the Cap de la Nau, Xàbia is one of the Mediterranean's most protected microclimates — 320 days of sun, pine-clad hills, three distinct bays and a stone-built old town. It's the reason we only work here.
home.locationPoint1: Old Town, the Port and the Arenal — three Xàbias, one town
home.locationPoint2: A protected microclimate around the Montgó natural park
home.locationPoint3: Blue-Flag beaches and hidden coves on the Cap de la Nau
home.locationPoint4: Tosca stone, whitewash and lime — the local building language
home.ctaText: On selected showroom days, private homeowners are welcome to explore our materials, designs and building concepts. Find inspiration and discuss your ideas with our team.

materials.title: Materials
materials.intro: Natural-looking, climate-ready surfaces for floors, walls and façades. Every finish in our library is chosen for how it lives in Mediterranean sun, salt and shade.
materials.noProducts: Talk to us about products in this material.

descriptions.travertine: Travertine-look panels — warm earth tones and a timeless, classic feel for floors, walls and façades.
descriptions.concrete: Concrete and cement looks with a sleek, industrial calm — versatile and durable, indoors and out.
descriptions.wood-look: Panels with a natural wood texture — the warmth of timber with the easy maintenance of stone.
descriptions.natural-stone: Light stone panels inspired by granite, limestone and sandstone — the look and feel of real natural stone.
descriptions.rammed-earth: Rammed-earth looks with layered, organic textures — raw, warm and full of character.
descriptions.terrazzo: Terrazzo and textured surfaces — playful, speckled and characterful.
descriptions.solid-surface: Seamless solid-surface elements — baths, basins and shower trays, warm to the touch and repairable.
descriptions.acrylic: Translucent acrylic sheets — modern, light and sculptural.
descriptions.glass-mirror: Glass and mirror elements that make a bathroom feel bright and spacious.
descriptions.brushed-metal: Towel bars, taps, hooks and hinges in matte brushed metal — the finishing details.
descriptions.xps-backer: Lightweight backer boards as a stable base for wall panels and tiling.

products.title: Products
products.intro: The pieces we specify most for Costa Blanca homes — large-format wall boards, solid-surface bathware, mirrors, hardware and more.
products.leadCollectionLead: Flexibel Stone is the heart of our collection — flexible natural-stone panels for walls, ceilings, furniture and façades. The other collections (bathroom, doors, accessories) round out the brief.
products.otherCollectionsLead: Curated to round out the signature collection — chosen to sit beside it in the same Mediterranean register.
products.lookbookLead: Different Flexibel Stone collections in real spaces — tap through to the product.
products.catalogueLead: Flexibel Stone leads — followed by bathroom, doors and accessories tuned to the same Mediterranean register. Scroll to meet each chapter.
products.chapterDescriptionWallPanels: Flexible natural-stone panels — travertine, burnt wood, concrete, limestone — in sheets up to 1.2 × 3.06 m. Wraps curved walls and ceilings, installed without grout.
products.chapterDescriptionBathroom: Solid-surface tubs, basins and shower trays — warm to touch and repairable. Seamless pieces that bring quiet to a bathroom.
products.chapterDescriptionDoors: Solid interior doors tuned to the same timber palette as the wall panels — for continuous surfaces from floor to ceiling.
products.chapterDescriptionDoorAccessories: Hinges in brushed matt metal — the finishing detail.
products.chapterDescriptionAccessories: Mirrors, towel bars, hooks and small sanitary pieces — chosen to sit with the lead collection.
products.browseAllLead: Filter by room, material or collection and browse all {count} products.
products.chapterDescriptionFlowerPots: Sculptural planters in a concrete look — the Boge and Epocco series. Frost- and UV-resistant, for terrace, garden and interior, in sand, salt, concrete grey, graphite, red ochre and macchiato.
products.chapterDescriptionLighting: Architectural lighting by George Lighting — track spots and wall and in-ground spots (IP65) in brushed bronze. For a refined, considered play of light, indoors and out.
products.chapterDescriptionSwitches: Switch gear by George Lighting — stainless-steel rocker and toggle switches, sockets, dimmers and a hotel panel in brushed bronze. Refined control that suits the interior.
products.chapterDescriptionAcrylicPanels: Translucent acrylic solid-surface panels — a warm, backlit alternative to natural onyx. For feature walls, bathrooms, bars and light objects, indoors and out.
products.chapterDescriptionFireplaces: Water-vapour fireplaces with a lifelike 3D flame of water mist and LED — no smoke, no heat. 128 adjustable flame colours, app control and a sleek matt-black finish. Available from 70 to 300 cm, as a see-through or built-in hearth.
products.chapterDescriptionPVCFloors: PVC floors with a realistic wood look — hard-wearing, water-resistant and quiet underfoot. Easy click-system installation, suited to homes and commercial spaces. Available in warm and smoked oak tones, in planks and herringbone.

hotelpaneel-niet-storen.name: Hotel Panel ‘Do Not Disturb / Make Up / Bell’

products.chapterDescriptionBackerBoards: Lightweight XPS backer boards — a stable, waterproof base for wall panels and tiling. Available from 6 to 30 mm.

backerFeatures.applicationsTitle: The waterproof base behind beautiful walls
backerFeatures.applicationsLead: XPS backer boards are the hidden layer that makes wet rooms work — a stable, fully waterproof substrate for shower walls, niches, benches, wall-hung frames and large-format tiling. From 6 to 30 mm, indoors and out.
backerFeatures.techTitle: Engineered for water, weight and heat
backerFeatures.techLead: A rigid extruded-polystyrene (XPS) core under a fibreglass-reinforced cement facing — light to carry, strong under tile, and stable in heat and damp.
backerFeatures.point1Text: The closed-cell core doesn't absorb water — ideal behind showers, around baths and in any wet area.
backerFeatures.point2Text: A fraction of the weight of cement board, yet stable enough to carry large-format tiles and stone panels.
backerFeatures.point3Text: Built with a fire-retardant formulation. The full fire classification is listed on the technical datasheet.
backerFeatures.point4Text: The mineral-coated surface resists mould and won't rot or swell — durable in steam and salt air.
backerFeatures.specNote: Full technical datasheet — fire class, thermal value and density — available on request.

doorFeatures.introEyebrow: Crafted for hospitality · Built to protect
doorFeatures.introText: Our doors combine timeless design with advanced engineering to deliver the highest levels of safety, acoustic performance and durability — made for hotels and premium projects.

layers.title: Real wood veneer
layers.text: Natural oak veneer with a protective UV lacquer or oil finish.

layers.title: HDF stabilisation layer
layers.text: High-density fibreboard for extra stability and flatness.

layers.title: Fireproof mineral core
layers.text: Non-combustible core board for outstanding fire resistance.

layers.title: Solid hardwood edge frame
layers.text: Engineered hardwood for maximum strength and screw holding.

layers.title: Acoustic insulation layer
layers.text: High-density acoustic layer that improves sound reduction.

layers.title: Intumescent fire seal
layers.text: Expandable strip that activates in case of fire to seal gaps.

layers.title: Automatic drop seal
layers.text: Concealed drop-down seal for smoke and acoustic protection.

layers.title: Multi-point locking system
layers.text: High-quality lock for safety and long-term durability.

layers.title: Concealed 3D hinges
layers.text: Adjustable in three directions, 120 kg load capacity.

layers.title: Smoke & acoustic gasket
layers.text: Perimeter seals that block smoke, sound and light.

performance.title: Excellent acoustic insulation
performance.text: Up to 42 dB Rw sound reduction.

performance.title: Luxurious natural finishes
performance.text: Real wood veneers and premium paints.

specs.v: hotel rooms, corridors, suites, lobbies, apartments

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.intro: Every part of the Mediterranean home asks for different materials, light and care. Explore ideas and finishes space by space.
spaces.noItems: Talk to us for tailored ideas for this space.

descriptions.bathroom: The bathroom asks for surfaces that shrug off steam and water. We bring together solid-surface basins, bathtubs and shower trays, large-format stone-look boards, brushed brassware and warm light — a calm, spa-like room built to last by the sea.
descriptions.kitchen: The kitchen is where the home gathers. Hard-wearing worktops, large-format wall boards behind the hob, micro-cement and warm timber fronts — finishes chosen for daily use, easy cleaning and the way Mediterranean light moves through the day.
descriptions.living-room: The living room is the heart of the house. Flowing stone or warm timber floors, feature walls in Flexibel Stone boards, micro-cement and lime plaster — materials that frame the view, take the afternoon sun and feel good underfoot.
descriptions.bedroom: The bedroom should feel quiet. Soft timber floors, warm lime or micro-cement walls, an upholstered headboard wall and gentle indirect light — a restful palette, with materials that breathe in the Costa Blanca climate.
descriptions.terrace: The terrace is an outdoor room. Slip-resistant stone paving, shaded pergolas, an outdoor kitchen and built-in seating — surfaces and detailing engineered for sun, salt and the Levante wind, so they look better with every season.
descriptions.garden: The garden ties the house to the land. Tumbled-stone paths, dry-stone retaining walls, native planting — olive, almond, lavender, rosemary — and considered lighting, all in materials that age gracefully outdoors.
descriptions.pool-area: The pool area takes the hardest punishment of any space: chlorine, salt and full sun. We specify pool surrounds, coping, non-slip decking and outdoor showers in finishes proven to survive — and to keep looking serene.
descriptions.outdoor-kitchen: The outdoor kitchen makes summer the main season. Stone or solid-surface worktops, large-format cladding, a built-in barbecue and storage, weatherproof joinery — everything detailed to live outdoors all year on the Costa Blanca.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: A look at the homes we build and renovate in and around Xàbia — from a derelict finca to a brand-new villa. On every project the before and after sit side by side, so you can see the transformation for yourself.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Four teams, one project manager. Everything you need to buy, build, renovate and furnish a home in Xàbia.
services.partnerNote: We work hand-in-hand with established Xàbia professionals. One of them:

sale.title: Finding your home in Xàbia
sale.intro: Independent estate agents work alongside us from the Habitat One showroom in Xàbia. A small, hand-picked selection of villas, plots and renovation projects will be listed here soon — and you can turn any of them into a finished home with one team.
sale.soonText: We're curating a short list of properties worth your time. In the meantime, tell us what you're looking for and we'll connect you with the right agent.
sale.s1Text: Trusted independent estate agents have a desk in our Xàbia showroom and use it to meet clients and walk them through materials and ideas.
sale.s2Text: We're putting together a small selection of villas, sea-view plots and renovation projects across Xàbia. They'll appear here.
sale.s3Text: Bought a renovation project or a bare plot? Our architects, lawyers and builders take it from there — one project manager, one plan, one finished home.
sale.s4Text: Looking now? Send us your brief — area, budget, new build or renovation — and we'll match you with the right agent and a realistic plan.
sale.buyerCta: Tell us what you're looking for
sale.agentTitle: Are you an estate agent in Xàbia?
sale.agentText: We host independent agents at the showroom. If you'd like a desk, the showroom and a partner for the design-and-build side, get in touch.

about.title: Habitat One
about.lead: Your partner for premium materials, design consultation and expert craftsmanship on the Costa Blanca.
about.storyTitle: Everything under one roof for your dream home
about.p1: At Habitat One, we bring together everything you need to realize your ideal home. Our experience centre in Jávea is designed as a complete one-stop-shopping concept, where we fully unburden our clients — from purchase to completion and everything in between.
about.p2: Whether you are looking for an existing property, a renovation project or a new development: with our partner Verhome Group we guide you through the purchase of carefully selected homes. Often unique opportunities — including, for example, bank-owned properties — which we transform into high-quality homes fully tailored to your wishes.
about.p3: Within Habitat One you will find all expertise under one roof. From architects and contractors to legal and administrative support, such as help obtaining a NIE number. We also offer an extensive range of high-quality materials and finishes, sourced directly from Asia, Italy, Spain and other European countries. Think kitchens, bathrooms, flooring, fireplaces and sustainable installations such as heat pumps — all carefully selected for quality, design and price.
about.p4: What sets us apart is the combination of trusted partners, craftsmanship and a fully integrated approach. You decide the style and the end result; we handle the execution — efficient, transparent and with an eye for detail.
about.p5: Habitat One is more than a showroom. It is the place where ideas become reality, and where your Spanish dream home is realized without worries.
about.value1Text: We only work with trusted European manufacturers and personally select every product in our collection to guarantee the highest standards.
about.value2Text: Every project is unique. We take the time to understand your needs and provide tailored advice — from concept to completion.
about.value3Text: We live and breathe interior design and architecture. Our team stays ahead of the trends to inspire and guide your choices.
about.value4Text: Based in Xàbia, we understand the local climate, building styles and regulations. We are your trusted neighbour in every project.
about.ctaText: Visit our showroom in Xàbia or get in touch — we would love to help bring your vision to life.
about.teamTitle: The people you will work with
about.teamNote: A close-knit team of architects, interior designers, material specialists and site managers — plus trusted partners across the Costa Blanca, including the Verhome Group and Antón Abogados.

contact.title: Let's talk about your home
contact.intro: Tell us about your plot, your property or your idea. We usually reply within one working day — in English, Dutch, Spanish or German.

showroom.title: The Xàbia showroom
showroom.intro: Experience our curated selection of premium materials in person. Touch, compare, and discover the perfect palette for your project.
showroom.exp1Text: Touch and compare hundreds of premium materials — natural stone, ceramics, hardwood, micro-cement and more.
showroom.exp2Text: Book a free session with our in-house architects and designers to plan your renovation or new build.
showroom.exp3Text: See our materials installed in full-scale room settings to visualise the final result before you commit.
showroom.exp4Text: Take home material samples to test in your own light and space.
showroom.bookText: Consultations are free and last about an hour. Tell us when suits you.
showroom.tourText: A 360° walk-through of the Jávea showroom is on the way. For now, come and see it in person.
showroom.subtitle: See · Feel · Experience
showroom.directionsText: In the heart of Xàbia with free parking available — just 90 minutes from Valencia and 75 minutes from Alicante airport.

footer.ctaTitle: The one-stop building and living experience in Xàbia.
footer.ctaText: Explore carefully curated materials, innovative products and inspiring solutions for your home. Whether you're building, renovating or simply looking for ideas, our showroom is designed to help you discover what's possible. Book your visit through our website and experience Habitat One firsthand.
footer.tagline: Build, renovate and live beautifully in Xàbia — materials, design, law and property under one Mediterranean roof.
footer.newsletterText: Material releases, project stories and the occasional house for sale. No noise.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thank you — you're on the list.
footer.builtIn: Designed & built on the Costa Blanca.

appointment.pickSlot: Select a date and time that works for you. We will confirm your appointment or suggest an alternative.
appointment.name: Name
